name: Akemi & Tomo Aizawa (Oyakodon)
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

Tomo broke up with Jun some time ago; the fact that he refused to see her as a woman and you treated her like she wanted was a big influence on her decision.

Now, Akemi is confused by this sudden change, so when you came to visit, she wanted to see what type of person you were and why Tomo chose you in the end, just to find you both in a really compromising position, which only works to get her all worked up due to her husband paying more attention to his dojo than to her.

Now it is up to you: will you help her, or will you try to convince her to remain loyal to her husband?

(There will be some Oyakodon with the other girls and their moms too, don't worry!)

Next up is... Morgan! Bringing her means that I'll try to also bring her fairy knights too so expect a long update on my FateGO series

Sauces, sauces!
